notes: 3.10.88 — FINAL R12 AUDIT: kiem toan cuoi 7 muc, phat hien va va 3 loi: (#1) 5 metric tien thieu unit=baseCurrency — them unit + get() kiem du 3 (money+fxSource+unit, thieu 1 = REJECT); (#2) 2 chip credit-note (renderArAp) loc CN KHONG kiem ccy roi dan nhan r.ccy — nay chi tru CN CUNG TE (nhat quan addArPayment 43709); (#3) assetExportPdf tong nguyen gia cong THO da te (TSCD co ccy per-record, footer cu thu nhan 'theo don vi tien goc moi dong') — nay CCY_AGG.sumBase quy VND, footer ghi ro. Cac muc PASS: (1) khong con duong bypass CCY_AGG — payments chung minh ccy ke thua record tai diem ghi, CN 43709 co loc ccy, cac reduce than trong body co toDisplay per-row; (2) export: arExportPdf tach te, projects/trend qua txAmt, dupes per-record; (3) chart: renderTrendChart txAmt per-row, inv charts *Base; (4) AI context: chi Base, khong co truong ccy tho; (5) cache: chi giu *ValueBase da convert; (7) mo phong 5 te VND/USD/EUR/SGD/JPY: VND+USD quy dung 2tr, EUR/SGD/JPY loai + 3 FX_MISSING vao DQ, metric/AI khong dinh te la. Test 9/9 + registry reject test 2/2. Bao gom 3.10.42-87. Rollback=3.10.41.
